_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: Both masses demonstrated typical histologic features of diffuse neurofibroma involving subcutaneous adipose tissue and showing an admixture of Schwann cells with wavy, slightly hyperchromatic nuclei, admixed with fibroblasts...
resourceName: NF1 porcine model with exon 31 excision
details: Spontaneous development of diffuse plexiform neurofibromas (dpNFs) with typical histologic features including mixed cellularity, Schwann cells, fibroblasts, collagen bundles, blood vessels and immune infiltration
